title: Nouns + Plurals
purpose: Drill noun gender, regular plural patterns, irregular plurals, and invariant nouns.
uiSignature: Rule-group board with compact badges for gender and plural type.
subdeckRules: Regular, irregular, and invariant nouns must be in separate subdecks.
Do not hide plural type labels during Preview.

regularRules: Masculine nouns ending in -й drop -й and add -и.
Masculine nouns ending in soft sign often take -и.
Feminine nouns ending in -а usually change to -ы.
Feminine nouns ending in -я usually change to -и.
Feminine nouns ending in soft sign usually take -и.
Neuter nouns ending in -о usually change to -а.
Neuter nouns ending in -е usually change to -я.
pluralRules.spellingRule: After г, к, х, ж, ч, ш, щ use -и, not -ы.
pluralRules.notes: Because the app is text-only right now, stress shifts should be treated as reference notes unless they change spelling (e.g. сёстры).

subdecks.title: Foundation noun gender deck
subdecks.whyThisExists: These are the noun/gender items explicitly listed together in the notes and form the best foundation for gender reps.

subdecks.title: Regular plural patterns
subdecks.whyThisExists: This subdeck trains the normal plural rules before the user faces irregular endings.

subdecks.title: Irregular plural watchlist
subdecks.whyThisExists: Irregular plurals must be isolated so the user can see exactly which nouns still need reps.

subdecks.title: Invariant nouns
subdecks.whyThisExists: These nouns keep the same form in singular and plural and should be drilled as their own tiny category.
